session.name: MPI-208 Phase 4 + Phase 5 (derived UI, reconcile, docs) + MPI-213 lane-key fix; handoff at final-acceptance + commit boundary

goal.original: Continue MPI-208 — generation queue refactor (cue/loop/stop/dual-engine state machine). Replace patch-over-patch cue/stop/status with a single owned generationStore state machine.
goal.summary: ALL 5 phases of MPI-208 are code-complete. Foundation + Phase 2 + Phase 3 are COMMITTED (e326e3e / 675880e / fff8444). Phase 4 (derived statusBar + genId bridge + _runLocal removal), Phase 5 (recovered-toast + regression checklist + docs), and the MPI-213 lane-key fix are all done, auto-verified, and Phase 4 + MPI-213 are LIVE-VERIFIED by the user — but UNCOMMITTED. Remaining: the final 7-point end-to-end acceptance sweep, then commit Phase 4 + Phase 5 + MPI-213 via mpi-end.

completed: Foundation B1-A/B/C (COMMITTED e326e3e): generationStore + tests, engine-tagged/merged SSE, engineOverride + effectiveEngine + R31

Phase 2 (COMMITTED 675880e): commandExecutor on the store — job register at engine+arch freeze, abort-token bail, store-phase model-load, engine-filtered SSE, exec.cancel->store.cancel. LIVE-VERIFIED.

Phase 3 (COMMITTED fff8444): generationService on the store (Option A) — store = lane/running truth, _cueQueue = pending intents, drain via setLoopCallback->_onLaneDrain, id-matched tool:cancelled. LIVE-VERIFIED + 3 console-fix rounds.

Phase 4 (UNCOMMITTED, LIVE-VERIFIED): statusBar derived from generation-store:changed (survivor re-latch fixes empty-bar, self-heal to idle, stage/total scoped to display job fixes stale 4/4); genId bridge (startGeneration _regId -> payload.genId -> store.register + activeGenerations.start({id})); _runLocal mirror removed (forceLocal from state.engineOverride, completes B1-C). Blocks/QueuePanel needed no edits (already store-backed facades + mount rebuild).

Phase 5 (UNCOMMITTED, auto-verified): 5s store poll intentionally NOT built (duplicate coverage — every runWorkflow exit settles the store, remote backstopped by _startHistoryPoll, local by WS-close reject); shipped the 'generation recovered' ui:info toast on _reconcileFromHistory success (archaeology Part-4 gap). Regression checklist written (research/regression-checklist.md). Docs updated (user-approved): events.md, component-state.md, comfy_engine.md §2.5a, ui-gotchas.md.

MPI-213 (UNCOMMITTED, DONE + LIVE-VERIFIED): lane-key mismatch fix — _laneOf now mirrors the store's engine->lane rule (forceLocal? 'local' : isRemote()?'remote':'local') so a no-Pod local gen's intent lane == its store lane; no more phantom '1 RUNNING'. Guard test tests/lane-agreement.test.cjs. Card in done.

Most are already live-verified piecemeal across Phases 3/4 + MPI-213 — this is the consolidated sweep.

Move MPI-208 card doing/validating -> done ONLY after the final acceptance passes and commit lands.

next_action.description: Run the final 7-point end-to-end acceptance from plan.md § Verification in the Electron app (user-ux): (1) exact 2026-07-06 stuck-bar repro — Pod installing + local CUE -> Stop -> navigate away/back -> bar idle, CUE+Stop again -> bar idle; (2) dual-lane remote+local, Stop each independently, other lane unaffected; (3) loop arm -> several drains -> disarm mid-run -> Stop, no re-fire storm; (4) multi-cue R05-R07 (Stop promotes, cancel one pending, clear rest); (5) history workspace gen + Stop + extend flow; (6) cloud toggle -> local selector + local gen + toggle back -> remote (R31); (7) preview Continue/Finish incl. loop-armed gates. Most are already live-verified piecemeal (Phase 3/4 + MPI-213) — this is the consolidated pass. THEN commit Phase 4 + Phase 5 + MPI-213 by explicit pathspec (list in context.files_modified) — Foundation/Phase-2/Phase-3 are ALREADY COMMITTED (e326e3e/675880e/fff8444), do NOT re-commit. THEN move MPI-208 card to done. NOTE: js/components/Primitives/MpiCanvas/MpiCanvas.js + managers/MaskManager.js are also dirty in the working tree but are NOT part of MPI-208 — verify their ownership (a concurrent session) before committing; do NOT sweep them into an MPI-208 commit.

key_decisions: Phase 4 scope narrowed: blocks/QueuePanel already route Stop/Cancel through Phase-3 store-backed facades + already rebuild overlays on mount from module-scoped peekCueQueue()+activeGenerations, so they needed ZERO edits. isGenerating/QueuePanel snapshot migration skipped (churn, no behavior change). The real gaps were the genId bridge + derived statusBar + _runLocal removal.

genId bridge: the store record's genId was hardcoded null so the derived bar couldn't correlate a store job to its id-tagged tool:* events. Now startGeneration mints _regId up front, threads it as payload.genId -> store.register({genId}), and passes the SAME id to activeGenerations.start({id}) (new optional id param, default fresh uuid).

statusBar self-heal is gated on _activeGenId !== null so a NORMAL completion flash (which already nulled _activeGenId via tool:idle) is not stomped; only a still-set _activeGenId with an empty store (missed terminal) forces idle. The job.genId !== null re-latch guard is LOAD-BEARING — excludes suppressed tool-panel previews (MpiToolOptionsResize, no genId) from flashing 'Starting'.

Phase 5 reconcile: the 5s dual-engine store poll was NOT built — every runWorkflow exit already settles the store and the promise is guaranteed to settle (remote via _startHistoryPoll, local via WS-close reject), so the store can't orphan a running job. Shipped only the recovered-toast (the genuine invisible-recovery gap).

MPI-213 root cause: _laneOf keyed the intent lane on forceLocal alone ('remote' when false) while generationStore keys the job lane on the RESOLVED engine ('local' when no Pod). A no-Pod local gen parked its intent on 'remote' but its store job ran on 'local' -> the store's 'local' drain fired _loopCallbacks.local (never set) -> intent never cleared -> phantom '1 RUNNING'. Fixed by making _laneOf mirror the engine resolution. The original 'settle(DONE) no-op on a pre-cancelled job' hypothesis was DISPROVEN (a trace agent confirmed nothing cancels the active job without a user Stop).
constraints: Shared git tree — commit by EXPLICIT pathspec (git commit --only <paths>), NEVER git add -A / git add . . Push stays user-authorized.
Foundation (e326e3e), Phase 2 (675880e), Phase 3 (fff8444) are ALREADY COMMITTED — the remaining uncommitted work is Phase 4 + Phase 5 + MPI-213 only.
MpiCanvas.js + MaskManager.js are dirty but NOT MPI-208 — a concurrent session owns them; do not commit them under MPI-208.
Final acceptance verify mode is user-ux.
Preserve (do NOT drop): MPI-141/198 path heal, MPI-156 keepalive, MPI-157 stop-all, MPI-179 mirror refresh, MPI-194 hot-store, MPI-203 history replay, MPI-206 model re-sync, MPI-74 P6 two-lane loop.
Do NOT make cancelled->done a legal store transition (would resurrect the Phase-3 round-3 ghost-gen bug).

resume_prompt: You are resuming MPI-208 (generation queue refactor) in Cubric Vision on branch RunPod. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/8ee9fbb1-ab1f-42c9-b152-a14b62e2e951.json and use mpi-continue to pick up. ALL 5 phases are code-complete. Foundation + Phase 2 + Phase 3 are ALREADY COMMITTED (e326e3e / 675880e / fff8444). Phase 4 (statusBar derived from generation-store:changed — survivor re-latch fixes empty-bar, self-heal to idle, stage/total scoped to the display job fixes the stale 4/4; a genId bridge so the store job carries _regId as genId; the _runLocal mirror removed so forceLocal derives from state.engineOverride) is done and LIVE-VERIFIED by the user. Phase 5 (a 'generation recovered' ui:info toast on _reconcileFromHistory success — the 5s store poll was intentionally skipped as duplicate coverage; a regression checklist; user-approved doc updates) is done and auto-verified. A queue bug reported mid-session via the MPI-208 inbox — a no-Pod local gen stranding the Cue as a phantom '1 RUNNING' — was root-caused to a lane-key mismatch (_laneOf keyed the intent lane on forceLocal while generationStore keys the job lane on the resolved engine), fixed by making _laneOf mirror the store's engine->lane rule (+ a guard test tests/lane-agreement.test.cjs), filed and closed as MPI-213 (done, LIVE-VERIFIED). Phase 4 + Phase 5 + MPI-213 are all UNCOMMITTED. Your next action: run the final 7-point end-to-end acceptance from plan.md § Verification in the Electron app (user-ux) — most points are already live-verified piecemeal, this is the consolidated pass — then commit Phase 4 + Phase 5 + MPI-213 by EXPLICIT pathspec (shared tree, never git add -A; the file list is in the handoff; do NOT re-commit the already-committed Foundation/Phase-2/Phase-3), then move the MPI-208 card to done. Note: js/components/Primitives/MpiCanvas/MpiCanvas.js and managers/MaskManager.js are also dirty in the working tree but are NOT part of MPI-208 (a concurrent session owns them) — do not sweep them into an MPI-208 commit. Do NOT make cancelled->done a legal store transition (it would resurrect the Phase-3 ghost-gen bug).
